name: Black Bean Tortilla Melt - Serves 6
recipeIngredient: 15 oz can black beans, rinsed and drained
2 (4 oz) cans chopped green chiles, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the beans; add chili powder and stir well.
2. Spread about three tablespoons of bean mixture on each tortilla.
3. Sprinkle with cilantro and squeeze one lime wedge over each tortilla.
4. Top each tortilla with two tablespoons of green chiles and two tablespoons of cheese.
5. Bake at 450°F for 3 to 5 minutes, or until the cheese melts. Serve with fresh salsa.
